title: Lafocuse 12 inch Silent Wooden Grain Frame LCD Wall Clock with Date and Temperature,Time,Month,Day of Week,Quartz Digital Brown Wall Clocks Battery Operated Decorative for Living Room Office Bedroom
features: 【Modern & Classic】Natural and realistic brown wooden texture plastic frame, wooden clock hands and white clock dial with black numbers add a touch of natural and elegant flair to your home. Very stylish and different, easily to attract other's attention.
【LCD Calendar & Thermometer】Adopting large HD LCD screen that shows the month, date, the day of the week and temperature clearly. You can set "Temperature" to Fahrenheit or Celsius.

【Easy to Set Date】Press "SET", when "Year" flashes, press "UP" or "DOWN" to adjust years. In the same way to adjust month and date. Continue press "SET" to enter the window of other settings. "Week" and "Temperature" will change automatically. For detailed settings, please refer to the instruction manual in the package.

【High Quality】Excellent HD glass front cover, wooden hands, sturdy ABS back cover and plastic frame, silent and accurate movement make our clock work longer. After you install it on the wall, it will run fluently.

【Broad Application】Diameter in 12" (30 cm). A practical addition to the dining rooms, living rooms, family rooms, bedrooms, study room, office, lounge, hall or kitchen ect. The wall clock is well packed, you can also send it to your friends or family as a holiday gift.
【3-Year Movement Assurance】: If the clock has any quality problem with movement in 3 years, please no hesitate to contact us. We'll give you a solution as soon as possible.
